overall.description: First-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a nighttime drive through a rain-soaked neon city. The player navigates through commercial and industrial districts with heavy atmospheric haze, wet reflective streets, and dense cyberpunk architecture illuminated by colorful neon signage.

scene_state.functional_zone: commercial street with convenience stores and food stalls

events.description: vehicle makes a right turn at intersection, passing street food vendors

agents.ego_description: navigating through wet commercial streets, observing storefronts and neon signage while maintaining moderate speed

notable_agents.action: standing near food stall under awning

entered.detail: illuminated vertical neon sign with Japanese characters
24-hour shop with bright interior lighting and glass facade
tall vertical neon sign with pink and blue palm tree design
small outdoor vendor with yellow umbrella and cooking equipment
row of illuminated drink dispensers on sidewalk

segments.scene_description: The segment opens with a first-person view from inside a vehicle driving through a rain-soaked commercial district at night. Neon signs illuminate the wet streets as the car passes convenience stores and street food vendors. The driver makes a right turn, revealing more storefronts and vending machines along the sidewalk.

scene_state.functional_zone: major intersection with large billboards and pedestrian crossings

events.description: vehicle approaches and crosses large scramble intersection with pedestrian crosswalks
vehicle slows and makes a right turn at traffic light

agents.ego_description: driving across a wide intersection, navigating around other vehicles and pedestrians in the crosswalk

notable_agents.action: taxi cab waiting at intersection for traffic signal

entered.detail: massive digital screen displaying animated character advertisement
building facade covered in colorful street art and graffiti
elevated walkway with metal railings spanning the street
wide white-striped pedestrian crossing covering entire intersection

segments.scene_description: The vehicle emerges into a wide urban intersection dominated by massive digital billboards and colorful murals. The driver crosses the scramble crosswalk, navigating around a waiting taxi and pedestrians. Large anime advertisements and neon signs tower above as the car makes a right turn, transitioning to a new street with different storefronts.

scene_state.functional_zone: elevated highway underpass with neon lighting

events.description: vehicle passes underneath elevated highway overpass with pink neon lighting
sharp right turn around corner near red torii gate structure

agents.ego_description: driving under the overpass shelter, making a sharp turn while avoiding the curb near a traditional gate structure

entered.detail: massive concrete highway structure spanning across the road
rows of magenta fluorescent tubes illuminating the underpass ceiling
traditional Japanese-style red gate with neon outlining
metal construction scaffolding along building facade

segments.scene_description: The vehicle drives underneath a massive elevated highway, entering a semi-covered area illuminated by striking pink neon lights. The shelter provides temporary respite from the rain. After emerging, the driver makes a sharp right turn near a red torii gate, passing construction scaffolding and entering a narrower commercial street.

scene_state.functional_zone: industrial underpass with orange sodium lighting

events.description: ambient lighting shifts from cool neon blue to warm orange sodium vapor lights
entering narrow industrial alleyway with graffiti-covered walls

agents.ego_description: navigating through increasingly narrow industrial streets with reduced visibility, adjusting to the warmer lighting conditions

entered.detail: large corrugated metal building with loading dock doors
low ceiling tunnel structure with rough concrete walls
concrete wall covered in colorful spray paint and street tags
orange and white striped plastic barriers blocking sidewalk

segments.scene_description: The lighting shifts dramatically to warm orange as the vehicle enters an industrial district. The car passes through a concrete underpass and emerges into a narrow alley lined with graffiti-covered walls and construction barriers. The environment feels more enclosed and gritty compared to the commercial areas, with warehouse buildings replacing retail storefronts.

scene_state.functional_zone: industrial back street with chain link fences and storage facilities

events.description: vehicle begins following a white sedan ahead on the narrow road
passing road construction barrels and temporary barriers

agents.ego_description: following a white sedan through narrow industrial streets, maintaining safe distance while navigating around construction obstacles

notable_agents.action: white sedan driving ahead, occasionally braking on the wet narrow road

entered.detail: tall metal security fence with barbed wire topping
tall concrete wall designed to block highway noise
orange plastic drums marking lane restrictions
dark tunnel opening with single overhead light

segments.scene_description: The vehicle follows a white sedan through increasingly narrow industrial back streets. Chain link fences and concrete noise barriers line the road, while orange construction barrels indicate roadwork ahead. The atmosphere is darker and more confined, with the tunnel entrance looming ahead creating a sense of progression into a more isolated area.

scene_state.functional_zone: mixed industrial-commercial intersection with liquor store

events.description: emerging from narrow industrial area back into wider commercial street with neon signage

agents.ego_description: continuing to follow the white sedan as the road widens, approaching an intersection with traffic lights and commercial establishments

notable_agents.action: person walking on sidewalk near storefront entrance

entered.detail: green neon sign advertising alcohol above store entrance
curved elevated road structure with support pillars
suspended traffic signal showing red light

segments.scene_description: The final segment shows the vehicle emerging from the industrial back streets into a wider intersection area. The white sedan continues ahead as neon signs, including a prominent liquor store sign, become visible again. The environment transitions back to a more commercial feel with traffic lights and storefronts, though the rain continues to fall on the wet reflective streets.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person drive through a rain-soaked commercial district that transitions from narrow neon-lit streets into a massive urban intersection and finally into a sheltered industrial corridor. It begins by gliding past convenience stores and street food vendors, where the wet pavement reflects the glow of nearby signage before the vehicle turns right. As the car emerges into a wide intersection, the view expands to reveal towering anime advertisements and massive digital billboards that dominate the skyline above a crowded scramble crosswalk. The scene then shifts as the vehicle passes under a massive elevated highway, moving from the open rain into a semi-covered area bathed in striking pink neon light. Finally, the camera makes a sharp right turn past a red torii gate and construction scaffolding, narrowing the perspective as it enters a dense commercial side street.

The shot follows a continuous drive that transitions from a gritty, orange-hued industrial district back into the neon-lit commercial heart of the city. It begins as the vehicle passes through a concrete underpass, emerging into a narrow, enclosed alley defined by graffiti-covered walls and warehouse buildings. As the car follows a white sedan deeper into the industrial back streets, the environment becomes increasingly confined by chain link fences and orange construction barrels before approaching a looming tunnel entrance. The scene then opens up as the vehicle emerges from these isolated corridors into a wider intersection, where the oppressive industrial tones give way to the glow of neon liquor store signs. Finally, the surroundings shift back to a commercial atmosphere with traffic lights and storefronts, all reflected on the rain-soaked streets.
